mapper.select: SELECT id, yard_cd, yard_nm, rows_count, columns_count, sector_count, space_width, space_length, spacing, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_master WHERE yard_cd = #{yardCd}

SELECT id, yard_cd, item_nm, item_type, width_val, length_val, position_x, position_z, rotation_y, color, status, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_item WHERE yard_cd = #{yardCd} AND status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY id
SELECT id, yard_cd, cctv_nm, position_x, position_z, direction, alarm_status, coverage_radius, coverage_angle, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_cctv WHERE yard_cd = #{yardCd} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yard_item (yard_cd, item_nm, item_type, width_val, length_val, position_x, position_z, rotation_y, color, status) VALUES (#{yardCd}, #{itemNm}, #{itemType}, #{widthVal}, #{lengthVal}, #{positionX}, #{positionZ}, #{rotationY}, #{color}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE yard_item SET position_x = #{positionX}, position_z = #{positionZ}, rotation_y = #{rotationY}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yard_alarm_log (yard_cd, cctv_nm, alarm_type, message) VALUES (#{yardCd}, #{cctvNm}, #{alarmType}, #{message})
